final:
module RefModule(
	input [7:0] A,
	input [7:0] B,
	input reset,
	input clk,               // Added clk as an input
	output reg [15:0] C
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
		if (reset) begin
			C <= 16'b0;
		end else begin
			C <= A + B;
		end
	end

endmodule
